title: KernelExecutionResult
description: The cross‑component contract for WatchLLM evaluation results.  Used by the Rust runtime (Wasm + CLI) and consumed by VSCode, Klyd, Replay, and the Orchestrator.  This is the canonical serialization shape for all non‑Python consumers.

status.description: Execution status: 'ok' for successful evaluation, 'error' for a caught internal error.

exit_code.description: Standard exit code: 0 = allowed (no violations), 1 = blocked (violations found), 2 = internal error.

payload.description: Evaluation payload.  Present when status is 'ok'; null when status is 'error'.

allowed.description: Whether the source is allowed (true) or blocked (false).

error.description: Error message.  Present when status is 'error'; null when status is 'ok'.
